name: Honeyed Peanut Butter
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat the ingredients together for several minutes until well combined. If you have a food processor, use it to mix the ingredients more efficiently.
2. Spread the mixture on bread and top with halved, seedless grapes, banana penne pasta, or crisp apple slices. The fruit will add moisture and make the sandwich deliciously moist, providing a pleasant surprise at lunchtime.
